questions.solution_text:
$-5$ is labelled and the marks step by $1$.
Counting right from $-5$: $-4$, $-3$.
$-3$

The marks step by $1$.
The arrow is $3$ intervals right of $5$: $6$, $7$, $8$.
$8$

The marks increase by $1$, so the value between $-7$ and $-5$ is one more than $-7$.
$-6$

The marks step by $1$. Counting left from $0$, the fourth mark is $-4$.
$B$ points to $-4$.
